g.text: [NOT LEGAL ADVICE — TOOL OUTPUT FOR INFORMATIONAL USE ONLY] This dependency map is generated by dep-map, an automated cross-cohort manifest
walker. It reports declared edges in go.mod / Cargo.toml / pyproject.toml / package.json / rebar.config / mix.exs. It does NOT adjudicate
whether a flagship is fit for any regulated purpose, nor whether the absence of an edge means the flagship is non-compliant. Operators MUST
treat each missing or unexpected edge as a prompt to investigate, not as a finding of fault.
